title: The Birds, the Bees and the Italians
writer: Luciano Vincenzoni, Pietro Germi, Agenore Incrocci
actors: Virna Lisi, Gastone Moschin, Alberto Lionello
plot: Three stories, all set in Treviso. Various couple experience adultery at a party, a bank clerk abandons his wife for his mistress and all the men in the end are prosecuted for having intercourse with an underage girl.
